message:
feat(plan): add independence-aware equivalence hints for trace semantics (bd-7256)

- Add IndependenceResult enum for pairwise independence analysis
- Add IndependenceRelation for tracking Mazurkiewicz independence pairs
- Add TraceEquivalenceHint for rewrite engine guidance
- Extend SideConditionChecker with trace-equivalence methods:
  check_independence(), commutes(), compute_independence_relation(),
  rewrite_valid_up_to_trace(), reorderable_join_children(),
  trace_equivalence_hint()
- 57 analysis tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
